name: Chunky Garden Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine tomato sauce, olive oil, vinegar, and honey.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients until well combined.
3. Serve each serving chilled with one of the garnishes:
- Herbed Garlic Croutons
- A dollop of plain yogurt topped with finely minced fresh chives
- Finely shredded lettuce
- Minced parsley (optional)
Variations:
- Add 2 Tbsp chopped fresh mint leaves; omit hot pepper sauce for a milder flavor.
- For a thinner soup, stir in tomato juice or vegetable cocktail juice to the desired consistency. Serve with a substantial salad and/or cheese platter.
